svg.title: AWS Architecture: API Gateway with Lambda functions per HTTP method connecting to EC2 Spring Boot REST API
svg.desc: Diagram showing API Gateway receiving HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), each routed to a dedicated Lambda function, which then connects to an EC2 instance running a Spring Boot REST API inside a VPC.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a client call API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What is AWS API Gateway and how does it route requests?')
sendPrompt('What does a GET Lambda function do when integrated with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does a POST Lambda function do when integrated with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does a PUT Lambda function do when integrated with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does a DELETE Lambda function do when integrated with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does a PATCH Lambda function do when integrated with API Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How is EC2 configured to run a Spring Boot REST API?')
sendPrompt('How does a Spring Boot REST API work on EC2?')
